expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly maps the benchmark focus to Phase 6 requirements: “This benchmark’s focus is explicitly covered… ‘Final quality pass preserves layering’ … required by the Phase 6 rubric’s Final Layering model… ‘Final quality pass preserves executable wording’ … required by… atomic action chain + observable verification leaves… and by the Phase 6 gate requiring executable-step checks.”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md is framed as “# Phase 6 (Final Quality Pass) — Contract Coverage Check” and details Phase 6 entry/work/required outputs (“drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md”, “context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md”), plus Phase 6-specific rubric sections and coverage preservation rules; execution_notes.md likewise states it “can validate phase6 contract alignment”.
